title: DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions!
